global_description: A medium-sized, plump songbird with a rounded body and short tail. It has a predominantly reddish-brown plumage with streaked patterns and a grayish head. The wings and back are darker with a rusty hue, and the underparts are heavily streaked with brown.
spatial_relations: The grayish head is positioned above the reddish-brown body
The wings extend from the sides of the body
The short tail is at the rear of the body
